result.stderr:
Bootstrap for Amazon Kinesis Client Library .NET 1.0.0.0
Copyright 2015 Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. All Rights Reserved.

  -j, --java                 Path to java, used to start the KCL multi-lang
                             daemon. Attempts to auto-detect if not specified.

  -p, --properties           Required. Path to properties file used to configure
                             the KCL.

  --jar-folder               Folder to place required jars in. Defaults to
                             ./jars

  -e, --execute              Actually launch the KCL. If not specified, prints
                             the command used to launch the KCL.

  -l, --log-configuration    A Logback XML configuration file

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
